pattern: Starting from the top-right corner, each comparison rules out an entire row or column, so the doubly-sorted matrix is searched in linear time relative to its dimensions.
hints: Begin at a corner where moving one way only increases values and the other only decreases them.
From the top-right cell, going left strictly decreases and going down strictly increases.
If the current cell is larger than the target move left, if smaller move down; reaching a match returns true and walking off the grid returns false.

edge_inputs.description: target present at the searched top-right corner
single column, absent value between entries

stress.description: random doubly-sorted matrix; target is sometimes a real cell, sometimes a near miss
stress.note: construction guarantees both row- and column-ascending order; mixes hits and misses
